hero.title: Discover the Magic of the Adriatic
hero.subtitle: Unforgettable full-day boat tours from Split and Trogir

splitTour.name: Blue Lagoon, Borkko Beach & Šolta
splitTour.description: Explore the gems of Split and surrounding islands aboard the motor yacht Tamaris. Sail to Borkko Beach on Čiovo island, Maslinica on Šolta island and the Blue Lagoon on Drvenik Veli.

trogirTour.name: Blue Lagoon & Šolta from Trogir
trogirTour.description: Discover the Blue Lagoon and Maslinica on a cruise from Trogir. Swim and snorkel, explore the charming village of Maslinica and enjoy a traditional Mediterranean lunch.

fleet.sectionSubtitle: Three premium boats for the perfect day at sea

tamaris.name: M/Y Tamaris
tamaris.description: 27-meter motor yacht with 3 decks, 2 air-conditioned salons, a fully equipped bar and sun terrace.

lovor.name: M/Y Lovor
lovor.description: 27-meter motor yacht, sister ship to Tamaris. Professional sound system and live DJ for sunset and evening cruises.

solo.name: M/B Solo
solo.description: 20-meter wooden motor boat with sun deck, sound system and swimming platform.

restaurant.sectionSubtitle: Dine under the pine trees in the heart of the Blue Lagoon
restaurant.description: Enjoy a traditional Mediterranean lunch at Restaurant Skoy, nestled under centuries-old pine trees in the Blue Lagoon. Fresh grilled fish, local wine and views of crystal-clear sea.

privateTours.sectionSubtitle: Weddings, events, team building and more
privateTours.description: Turn our boats into your exclusive cruise. Perfect for weddings, corporate events, team building or special celebrations.

cta.title: Ready for an Adventure?
cta.subtitle: Book your unforgettable day on the Adriatic

gallery.sectionSubtitle: Experience the atmosphere of our tours

about.sectionSubtitle: Over 10 years of unforgettable experiences at sea
about.story: Max Nautica is the leading boat tour company in Split and Trogir. With over 10 years of experience and three premium boats, we provide unforgettable full-day tours to the Blue Lagoon, Šolta island and the most beautiful hidden coves of the Adriatic.
about.mission: Our mission is to provide guests with an authentic Mediterranean experience — from crystal-clear seas and hidden beaches to traditional lunch under the pine trees in the Blue Lagoon.

pricing.sectionSubtitle: Transparent pricing with no hidden costs
pricing.charterOnRequest: For private tours and charter, contact us for a custom quote.
